summary: Implemented the smallest Radar Task management API slice with Prisma-backed server helpers, Next.js route handlers, shared Zod validation, structured JSON errors, and README usage notes.

tests_run.result: Next.js production build completed after fixing the route typing issue found in the first local build attempt.

decisions: Kept the slice server-only and local/single-admin as required; no auth, session, UI, scan orchestration, SERP provider, LLM, deployment, or Prisma schema work was added.
Reused the existing Radar Task schema shape and extended it with update, list-query, and route-param schemas instead of adding ad hoc validation in route handlers.
Returned success payloads as { data: ... } and validation/not-found/unexpected failures as structured { error: ... } JSON responses.
risks: DELETE performs a hard delete through the existing Prisma relation cascade; this matches the current CRUD wording but should be revisited before exposing the API beyond the local MVP admin workflow.
No integration tests were added because the task only required Prisma validation, Prisma generation, and a production build.
requested_action: Review the API and persistence boundary before routing to QA acceptance.
